stance: Diplomatic Ambassador for Vel'Ar Federation in interstellar commerce negotiation
vita: As a representative of the Vel'Ar, I have traversed countless star systems to foster trade and diplomacy among diverse species. My life is dedicated to bridging gaps between civilizations through understanding and mutual benefit, ensuring prosperity for my people while respecting others.
portrait_prompt: An elegant Vel'Ar with a distinguished silver-threaded cloak reflects the sophistication of our culture. The transparent background showcases an intricate tapestry that symbolizes transparency and openness in diplomacy, set against my humanoid form standing before a backdrop of twinkling stars.
